## Meeting Purpose

[Sync on content status and review recent performance trends.](https://fathom.video/share/3K3HsZWmYnDu1Uh3Z3hHiy_3v1YzyjQd?tab=summary&timestamp=65.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Entity Details Cluster:** Awaiting final review from Ben (Product) before publishing the second batch. Mike has prompted Ben for feedback.](https://fathom.video/share/3K3HsZWmYnDu1Uh3Z3hHiy_3v1YzyjQd?tab=summary&timestamp=65.0)
  - [**Strong Performance:** Clicks are up despite a general market downturn, driven by a highly targeted content strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/3K3HsZWmYnDu1Uh3Z3hHiy_3v1YzyjQd?tab=summary&timestamp=141.0)
  - [**Explosive LLM Growth:** LLM traffic has surged since July, validating the content's "LLM-friendly" structure.](https://fathom.video/share/3K3HsZWmYnDu1Uh3Z3hHiy_3v1YzyjQd?tab=summary&timestamp=218.0)
  - [**Next Week:** Jenn will present a full month-over-month performance overview for October.](https://fathom.video/share/3K3HsZWmYnDu1Uh3Z3hHiy_3v1YzyjQd?tab=summary&timestamp=180.0)

## Topics

### Content Status: Entity Details Cluster

  - [**Blocker:** Publishing the second batch of "Entity Details" content is on hold pending final review from Ben (Product).](https://fathom.video/share/3K3HsZWmYnDu1Uh3Z3hHiy_3v1YzyjQd?tab=summary&timestamp=65.0)
  - [**Action:** Mike has messaged Ben directly to request feedback.](https://fathom.video/share/3K3HsZWmYnDu1Uh3Z3hHiy_3v1YzyjQd?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)
  - [**Resolution:** A minor issue found by Mike was fixed by removing a confusing section from the content template, preventing recurrence.](https://fathom.video/share/3K3HsZWmYnDu1Uh3Z3hHiy_3v1YzyjQd?tab=summary&timestamp=322.0)
  - [**Timeline:** The second batch is in the queue for next week's publication.](https://fathom.video/share/3K3HsZWmYnDu1Uh3Z3hHiy_3v1YzyjQd?tab=summary&timestamp=339.0)

### Performance Analysis

  - [**Context:** The site is outperforming the general market, which is experiencing high volatility ("CERT volatility").](https://fathom.video/share/3K3HsZWmYnDu1Uh3Z3hHiy_3v1YzyjQd?tab=summary&timestamp=141.0)
  - [**Key Metric:** Clicks are up, even as impressions have decreased.](https://fathom.video/share/3K3HsZWmYnDu1Uh3Z3hHiy_3v1YzyjQd?tab=summary&timestamp=141.0)
      - [**Rationale:** This indicates the content is highly relevant to searcher intent, driving a higher click-through rate.](https://fathom.video/share/3K3HsZWmYnDu1Uh3Z3hHiy_3v1YzyjQd?tab=summary&timestamp=141.0)
  - [**LLM Traffic:** Growth since July has been explosive.](https://fathom.video/share/3K3HsZWmYnDu1Uh3Z3hHiy_3v1YzyjQd?tab=summary&timestamp=218.0)
      - [**Drivers:** Increased content volume and an "LLM-friendly" structure (well-chunked, clear).](https://fathom.video/share/3K3HsZWmYnDu1Uh3Z3hHiy_3v1YzyjQd?tab=summary&timestamp=218.0)
  - [**Pillar Performance:** Weekly data shows shifts (e.g., Washington, D.C. franchise tax piece up; Oklahoma pieces down).](https://fathom.video/share/3K3HsZWmYnDu1Uh3Z3hHiy_3v1YzyjQd?tab=summary&timestamp=205.0)
      - [**Future Use:** This data will inform content refresh priorities after the current net-new content push is complete.](https://fathom.video/share/3K3HsZWmYnDu1Uh3Z3hHiy_3v1YzyjQd?tab=summary&timestamp=264.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Mike:** Secure final review from Ben for the "Entity Details" cluster.](https://fathom.video/share/3K3HsZWmYnDu1Uh3Z3hHiy_3v1YzyjQd?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)
  - [**Jenn:** Present a full month-over-month performance overview for October next week.](https://fathom.video/share/3K3HsZWmYnDu1Uh3Z3hHiy_3v1YzyjQd?tab=summary&timestamp=180.0)
